commands.review_summary:
The branch adds fallback deletion of Google Chat's temporary typing message on silent NO_REPLY turns, a monitor regression test, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main creates a message-backed Google Chat typing placeholder, exact NO_REPLY skips dispatcher delivery, and the monitor can return from core.channel.turn.run with typingMessageName still set.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed for lifecycle correction and real Google Chat proof before merge; do not queue a separate repair while the linked issue and canonical PR remain paired.

summary_lines: The PR changes Discord reply delivery, sanitizer, and queued follow-up auto-reply paths so explicit verbose tool-progress payloads are delivered while final assistant replies still use the privacy sanitizer.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main strips tool-looking Discord payload text at the front-chann ... ds compaction events in queued follow-up runs. I did not run a live Discord repro in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(googlechat): clean up typing message on NO_REPLY
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #39843

When a Google Chat agent reacts with an emoji via `reactions.create` and then returns `NO_REPLY`, the "_Clawdbot is typing..._" message persists indefinitely because the `deliver` callback is never invoked.

**Root cause:** The Google Chat channel sends a typing indicator as a real message (`_BotName is typing..._`), stored in `typingMessageName`. The `deliver` callback clears this by either updating or deleting it. When the agent returns NO_REPLY, `deliver` is never called and the typing message is left orphaned.

**Fix:** After `dispatchReplyWithBufferedBlockDispatcher` returns, check if `typingMessageName` is still set (meaning `deliver` was never called). If so, delete the typing message. This mirrors the pattern used by Discord (#27039) and other channels for NO_REPLY cleanup.

## Test plan

- [x] TypeScript check passes
- [x] Verified `deleteGoogleChatMessage` is already imported and used in the same file
- [x] The cleanup only fires when `typingMessageName` is still set (deliver was never called)
- [x] Error during cleanup is caught and logged, not thrown
target.author: mumutw
